app.name: ExtWarden
app.headline: Protect your browsing.
app.subheadline: Manage your extensions, detect risks and protect your sensitive sites.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.heroDesc: {{count}} risk vectors detected across installed extensions.

audit.title: Permission Audit
audit.subtitle: Real-time supervision of accesses and vulnerabilities.

updates.title: Change Detection
updates.subtitle: Update monitoring and privilege escalation detection
updates.firstRun: Install ExtWarden to start monitoring updates.
updates.pendingReview: Extensions with new permissions — review required

zones.title: Safe Zones
zones.subtitle: Group sensitive sites by category. Risky extensions will be blocked automatically.
zones.noZones: No zones configured. Create a category to get started.

alert.title: Security Block
alert.message: Execution of {{name}} (risk {{level}}) was prevented on this site.

about.description: ExtWarden analyzes installed Chrome extensions and protects you on sensitive sites using a risk model based on permissions and host scope.

features.privacyFirst: No telemetry or external server connections

steps.step1: The audit engine calculates a risk score combining each permission's weight and the host_permissions scope.
steps.step2: The change detection module creates permission and version snapshots, alerting when an update introduces new privileges.
steps.step3: Context control monitors every navigation and automatically disables risky extensions on sites defined as safe zones.
